creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
When I look at the particular newer version of the specific port I maintain, my installation isn't represented among the versions shown as installed on the bsdstats.org site. Even though I definitely have manually rerun the submission script and it finished successfully.

So there is some data loss. I wonder if the declining total counts, shown for FreeBSD, is due to this data loss.

Somebody familiar with the data flow to this site should take a look.
